claims.statement: Mount Everest height is at least 4× larger than Challenger Deep depth.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Mount Everest height: 8848.9 m. Challenger Deep depth: 10984 m.

claims.statement: Category 5 hurricane threshold is faster than Shanghai Maglev top speed.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Category 5 hurricane threshold: 252 km/h. Shanghai Maglev top speed: 431 km/h.

claims.statement: Lærdal Tunnel length is shorter than Seikan Tunnel length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Lærdal Tunnel length: 24.51 km. Seikan Tunnel length: 53.85 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer bones in an adult human body than known chemical elements.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 206 bones vs 118 elements.

viz.labelA: bones in an adult human body

claims.statement: World Wide Web proposed happened after Wikipedia launched.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. World Wide Web proposed: 1989. Wikipedia launched: 2001.
